summary: Nice Senn441 soundboard capture of an average 1986 show, highlighted by a surprisingly fast Eyes of the World.
review: The recording, made with a Sennheiser 441 front‑of‑house mic, is described as very nice sounding and earns four‑plus stars for its clarity. The performance itself is considered only average (three stars), though reviewers do note a surprisingly brisk rendition of "Eyes of the World" as a highlight. Overall the set is enjoyable but not among the Dead's top shows.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is rated around average (≈3 ★) while recording quality is praised highly (≈4.5 ★); weighting yields a mid‑range overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers call the sound "very nice sounding" and give four+ stars to the recording, indicating clear, well‑balanced audio with no major issues noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing; overall considered an average show with a few enjoyable moments.
